achievement.timelordregen.description.wa: Obtain a pocket watch — a vessel that holds regeneration energy.
achievement.timelordregen.title.watch: More than just a pocket watch!
The gods who walk in the shadows have for the first time become aware of incredible science.
advancements.timelordregen.unbearably_pa: You feel your organs growing, and your cells multiplying like never before.
advancements.timelordregen_gallifrey.des: A rust-coloured planet outside of time, its interior as rusty as its exterior — and laggy.
command.regen.fail: No regenerations left or already regenerating!
command.regen.name: Regenerate
command.regenui.name: Regeneration UI
gui.regen.settings.title: Regeneration Settings
gui.regen.settings.not_timelord: You are not a Time Lord!
item.timelordregen.elixir_of_life.desc: (Grants you the regenerative abilities of a Gallifreyan, transforming you into a true Time Lord)
item.timelordregen.pocket_watch.desc: A Time Lord's regeneration vessel. Binds to its owner on first use. Allows transfer of regeneration charges between the player and the watch.
origin.timelordregen.regeneration.descri: Phantoms will no longer spawn near you. A transparent hardened membrane grows beneath your skin, allowing you to survive longer underwater and in vacuum, with reduced food consumption. Meanwhile, your body has a way of cheating death by regenerating all its cells — but only twelve times in total.
origin.timelordregen.regeneration.name: Gallifreyan Physiology
origin.timelordregen.timelord.descriptio: She saw the gods themselves — not as mortals see them, but as they see one another: infinite living fire, the eternal serpent devouring its own tail; wheel within wheel, spinning with the same grace as the stars in the night sky. Burning eyes, unblinking upon every sun and planet in creation, counting the days and nights.
origin.timelordregen.timelord.name: Time Lord
